allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=taxee psql -U taxee -d taxee -h localhost -P pager=off)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=taxee psql -U taxee -d taxee -h localhost -P pager=off -c "SELECT asset_id, quantity, cost_basis_usd, acquired_at::date, status, CASE WHEN tx_hash IS NULL THEN '\(null\)' ELSE substring\(tx_hash, 1, 12\) END as tx FROM lots WHERE agent_id = '0d4368eb-7f7c-4637-a73c-7e2a39708b6c' ORDER BY acquired_at;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=taxee psql -U taxee -d taxee -h localhost -P pager=off -c "SELECT id, type, llm_decision, headline, tax_saving_estimate, execution_status, approved_at, executed_at FROM opportunities WHERE agent_id = '0d4368eb-7f7c-4637-a73c-7e2a39708b6c' AND executed_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=taxee psql -U taxee -d taxee -h localhost -P pager=off -c "DELETE FROM opportunities WHERE id = 'af67f499-7ee8-4f06-9af2-7e88246f3a5d';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=taxee psql -U taxee -d taxee -h localhost -P pager=off -c "SELECT id, type, execution_status, headline FROM opportunities WHERE agent_id = '0d4368eb-7f7c-4637-a73c-7e2a39708b6c' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=taxee psql -U taxee -d taxee -h localhost -P pager=off -c "SELECT asset_id, quantity, cost_basis_usd, tx_hash IS NULL AS synthetic FROM lots WHERE agent_id = '0d4368eb-7f7c-4637-a73c-7e2a39708b6c' ORDER BY acquired_at;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=taxee psql -U taxee -d taxee -h localhost -P pager=off -c "UPDATE opportunities SET execution_status = NULL, execution_error = NULL, failed_at = NULL, approved_at = NULL WHERE id = '64812064-7977-45a9-9406-2caf3dfcf506' RETURNING id, type, headline, execution_status;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=taxee psql -U taxee -d taxee -h localhost -P pager=off -c "SELECT id, execution_status, executed_at, tx_hash, failed_at, execution_error FROM opportunities WHERE id = '64812064-7977-45a9-9406-2caf3dfcf506';")
